productDisplayName: Nike Men T-Lite Black Sports Shoes
description: The nike T-Lite 9 SL shoe is a great combination of support and durability. These training shoes offer all-around support, cushioning and durability to meet the demands of core performance. You can also team these with jeans and a tee for a great casual wear option.UpperLeather upper for durability and comfortPerforations on the toe box, sides and heel counter for breathabilityCushioned collar and tongue for plush comfortLace-ups for snug Fit and to lock the foot in placeAppliquéd swoosh logo on the side to create a style statementMidsoleFull-length Phylon midsole for lightweight cushioningOutsolePhylite and solid rubber outsole for excellent traction on a variety of surfacesFlex grooves for flexibility and natural movement of the feetShoe careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
